perturbation.original_text: HSNS may make a reasonable number of copies (not more than five (5)) of the Application for archival purposes, and a reasonable number of copies of the Documentation as needed by HSNS solely for HSNS' internal use, provided all copyright and proprietary notices are reproduced. HSNS may make one (1) copy of the end user sections of the Documentation for each Outsourcing Customer. All titles, trademarks, copyright and restricted rights notices shall be reproduced in such copies. HSNS shall not use any Applications that E.piphany delivers with licensed Application, for which HSNS has not purchased a license.
perturbation.changed_text: HSNS may make a reasonable number of copies (not more than five (5)) of the Application for archival purposes. HSNS can create as many copies of the Documentation as needed with no restrictions on usage or proprietary notices. HSNS may make one (1) copy of the end user sections of the Documentation for each Outsourcing Customer. All titles, trademarks, copyright and restricted rights notices shall be reproduced in such copies. HSNS shall not use any Applications that E.piphany delivers with licensed Application, for which HSNS has not purchased a license.
perturbation.explanation: The changed text removes the restriction on the number of copies of 'Documentation' that HSNS can make and removes the phrase 'solely for HSNS' internal use, provided all copyright and proprietary notices are reproduced,' which contradicts the original intent of limiting usage and ensuring copyright protection. This creates an in-text contradiction as it suggests that HSNS has unlimited rights to copy and use the documentation. Also, this creates a conflict with Section 8.2 'Proprietary Notices. HSNS shall not remove any E.piphany trademark, copyright or other proprietary notices from any part of the Application or Documentation, and shall reproduce such notices on any copies of such materials made by HSNS.
perturbation.contradicted_text: PROPRIETARY NOTICES. HSNS shall not remove any E.piphany trademark, copyright or other proprietary notices from any part of the Application or Documentation, and shall reproduce such notices on any copies of such materials made by HSNS. Moreover, HSNS shall consistently identify the Application as a managed application in the Outsourcing Services to existing and prospective Outsourcing Customers in the ordinary course of HSNS' business.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes restrictions on the number of copies of the 'Documentation' and removes the requirement for proprietary notices, directly contradicting the contradicted text. The contradicted text explicitly states that 'HSNS shall not remove any E.piphany trademark, copyright or other proprietary notices from any part of the Application or Documentation, and shall reproduce such notices on any copies of such materials made by HSNS.' The changed text allows HSNS to create copies of the documentation without restrictions on proprietary notices, which directly violates the obligation to reproduce such notices, creating a clear contradiction and making the original obligation unenforceable.

perturbation.original_text: HSNS shall maintain complete and accurate records of its activities under this Agreement for at least two (2) years following termination of this Agreement. HSNS agrees to allow E.piphany, directly or indirectly, to audit HSNS's business records as kept by HSNS in its normal course of business to ensure compliance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement. If the audit reveals that HSNS has failed to comply with the terms of this Agreement, in addition to all other remedies available to E.piphany at law or equity, HSNS shall immediately reimburse E.piphany for any unpaid amounts due and the cost of the audit.
perturbation.changed_text: HSNS shall maintain complete records of its activities under this Agreement for at least one (1) year following termination of this Agreement. HSNS agrees to allow E.piphany, directly or indirectly, to audit HSNS's records as it see fits, to ensure compliance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement. If the inspection reveals that HSNS has failed to comply with the terms of this Agreement, in addition to all other remedies available to E.piphany at law or equity, HSNS shall immediately reimburse E.piphany for any unpaid amounts due and the cost of the inspection.
perturbation.explanation: The changed text modifies the record-keeping requirements from 'complete and accurate records' to 'complete records' and changes the audit parameters. Also, the duration for maintaining records has been reduced from two years to one year and an 'audit' changed to 'inspection' which suggests a less stringent review. This introduces ambiguity about the standards for record keeping and what activities can be looked at and for how long the records should be kept. This creates a contradiction with Section 2.1 'ANNUAL REPORTS. On the thirtieth (30th) day after the end of each of the first two years of this Agreement, HSNS shall submit to E.piphany a report (in a form provided by E.piphany and reasonably acceptable to HSNS) listing&bbsp;(i) the total number of emails distributed for Years 1 and 2 and (ii) the Application with which the Outsourcing Services are rendered. Year 2 and Year 3 Quarterly Payments, as defined in Exhibit "A," shall be based upon these annual reports. All reporting and payment requirements under this Section shall be subject to the audit requirements of this Agreement.'
perturbation.contradicted_text: ANNUAL REPORTS. On the thirtieth (30th) day after the end of each of the first two years of this Agreement, HSNS shall submit to E.piphany a report (in a form provided by E.piphany and reasonably acceptable to HSNS) listing&bbsp;(i) the total number of emails distributed for Years 1 and 2 and (ii) the Application with which the Outsourcing Services are rendered. Year 2 and Year 3 Quarterly Payments, as defined in Exhibit "A," shall be based upon these annual reports. All reporting and payment requirements under this Section shall be subject to the audit requirements of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text alters the audit parameters and record-keeping requirements. The original text specifies 'complete and accurate records' to be maintained for two years, while the changed text reduces this to 'complete records' for one year and changes 'audit' to 'inspection'. The contradicted text in ANNUAL REPORTS requires HSNS to submit reports for the first two years of the agreement, which are subject to audit requirements. Since the changed text shortens the record-keeping duration to one year and reduces the strictness of the audit, this directly contradicts the ANNUAL REPORTS section which relies on two years of records subject to a full audit. Therefore, the modification introduces an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: HSNS acknowledges and agrees that any and all Deliverables shall be and remain the property of E.piphany. E.piphany grants HSNS a non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-sublicensable license to use such Deliverables solely for is internal use consistent with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: HSNS acknowledges and agrees that any and all Deliverables shall be and remain the property of E.piphany. E.piphany grants HSNS a perpetual, exclusive, transferable, sublicensable license to use such Deliverables for its commercial use consistent with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The changed text significantly alters the licensing terms for Deliverables granted to HSNS. By changing 'non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-sublicensable license' to 'perpetual, exclusive, transferable, sublicensable license', and by specifying that the license is for 'commercial use' instead of 'internal use', HSNS now has far greater rights. This creates a conflict with Section 8.1 'E.PIPHANY OWNERSHIP. HSNS acknowledges that E.piphany retains all right, title and interest in the Application and any modifications thereto, including without limitation any customization, enhancement, amendment or change to the Application. HSNS hereby assigns all right, title and interest in and to any customization, enhancement, amendment or changes made by or for HSNS pursuant to this Agreement, and hereby waives any and all moral rights that HSNS may retain in and to such customizations, enhancements, amendment and changes. The Application and any modifications are licensed pursuant to this Agreement to HSNS for use of the Application and any modifications thereto. HSNS hereby represents and warrants that the assignment of rights by HSNS in and to such modifications includes any right, title and interest in and to all modifications created by or for HSNS For avoidance of doubt, modification to the Application to be owned by E.piphany shall not include pre-existing HSNS intellectual property or intellectual property developed by HSNS without reference to E.piphany Confidential Information. All data created by HSNS using the Outsourcing Application shall be owned by HSNS.
perturbation.contradicted_text: E.PIPHANY OWNERSHIP. HSNS acknowledges that E.piphany retains all right, title and interest in the Application and any modifications thereto, including without limitation any customization, enhancement, amendment or change to the Application. HSNS hereby assigns all right, title and interest in and to any customization, enhancement, amendment or changes made by or for HSNS pursuant to this Agreement, and hereby waives any and all moral rights that HSNS may retain in and to such customizations, enhancements, amendment and changes. The Application and any modifications are licensed pursuant to this Agreement to HSNS for use of the Application and any modifications thereto. HSNS hereby represents and warrants that the assignment of rights by HSNS in and to such modifications includes any right, title and interest in and to all modifications created by or for HSNS For avoidance of doubt, modification to the Application to be owned by E.piphany shall not include pre-existing HSNS intellectual property or intellectual property developed by HSNS without reference to E.piphany Confidential Information. All data created by HSNS using the Outsourcing Application shall be owned by HSNS.
perturbation.justification: The changed text grants HSNS a 'perpetual, exclusive, transferable, sublicensable license' for 'commercial use' of the Deliverables. This directly contradicts the original intent and language of the 'E.PIPHANY OWNERSHIP' section, which states that E.piphany 'retains all right, title and interest in the Application and any modifications thereto' and that HSNS assigns all rights to modifications made by or for them. The original text ensured E.piphany's ownership and control, while the modified text provides HSNS with significant and potentially conflicting commercial rights, including the ability to sublicense and transfer, thereby creating a direct conflict.
